unit.name: WPHX-312 generated-adapter copied public surface coverage
unit.area: HTTP response/cookie/encoding helpers, WP_Http helpers/parser/shim, and feed/embed/HTTPS copied public surfaces
unit.public_contract: This gate accounts for copied public surfaces routed to generated adapters. It maps existing generated successor candidates and selected-boundary successor gates; copied oracle fixtures remain behavior evidence until replacement gates pass.

bridge.removal_gate: Retire this coverage-only gate after all generated-adapter copied surfaces either have durable compiler-emitted original-path replacement evidence or are superseded by a broader WPHX PHP backend/public-shell ownership gate.
